title: Parks and Facilities • Golden Gate & Steiner Mini Park
content: Claim a bench and relax in this small plaza at the intersection of Golden Gate Ave and Steiner St. Pretty flowerbeds are set against a brightly painted fence.

title: Golden Gate Park - San Francisco - Klook
content: The Golden Gate was fantastic visit with clear skies, and our tour guide Cindy Chen showed us all the great photo spots. Her patience and knowledge was helpful,
